boundary: Memory evidence is not transaction finality visibility or recovery authority.
Metrics do not authorize rows commits recovery or security.
Indexes cannot become result transaction finality or visibility authority and require exact MGA security recheck before result use.
Optimizer evidence cannot become row visibility transaction finality reference or parser authority.
Agents cannot become transaction recovery security optimizer plan or index finality authority.
Support bundles are observability artifacts only.
Reference comparisons are comparison only and never ScratchBird runtime authority.
Cluster public stubs are fail-closed; production cluster behavior requires an external provider.
